steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the overall structure of the text. Map it in two parts: (1) wheel-fashioned ceramics are "overemphasized in innovation studies," contributing to the idea that technological change always brings greater complexity; (2) Haddad's research introduces "an important exception" — gold metallurgy in the Caucasus actually became simpler over time. The structure is: flawed widespread interpretation, then a counterexample that challenges it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It summarizes the findings of several studies into the origins of a particular invention and then presents additional evidence from a more recent study that contradicts those findings.": The passage mentions only one example (wheel ceramics) and one researcher (Haddad), not several studies whose findings are contradicted by newer research. ✗
  • "It details the near-consensus among researchers in a particular field of study regarding how technology evolves and then indicates the controversial nature of a study challenging that broadly accepted view.": The passage never says Haddad's study is controversial or disputed by others — it is simply presented as an exception. ✗
  • "It explains that a particular interpretation of technological development has been perpetuated in an academic field and then provides a counterexample demonstrating that the interpretation isn't always accurate.": The "overemphasized" idea (technology always adds complexity) is the perpetuated interpretation; Haddad's gold metallurgy data is the counterexample showing that interpretation fails in at least one case. ✓
  • "It advances a claim made by researchers in one academic field about the nature of technological change and then critiques a contrasting claim presented by a researcher from a related academic field.": The passage does not pit one researcher's claim against another's in a critique. Haddad is not criticized — Haddad's work is used as evidence. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
